en: Then Joseph fell on his father's face and wept over him and kissed him.
zh: 約瑟伏在他父親的臉上，為他哀哭，與他親吻。

en: And Joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father. So the physicians embalmed Israel.
zh: 約瑟吩咐臣僕中作醫生的，用香料包殮了他的父親。他們就用香料包殮了以色列。

en: Forty days were required for it, for that is how many are required for embalming. And the Egyptians wept for him seventy days.
zh: 這事足足費了四十天，因為用香料包殮屍體是需要這樣長的時間。埃及人為他哀哭了七十天。

en: And when the days of weeping for him were past, Joseph spoke to the household of Pharaoh, saying, "If now I have found favor in your eyes, please speak in the ears of Pharaoh, saying,
zh: 為他哀哭的日子過了，約瑟就對法老家裡的人說：“我若在你們面前得蒙喜悅，請你們代我稟告法老說：

en: My father made me swear, saying, 'I am about to die: in my tomb that I hewed out for myself in the land of Canaan, there shall you bury me.' Now therefore, let me please go up and bury my father. Then I will return."
zh: ‘我父親曾經叫我起誓，說：“看哪，我快要死了；你要把我埋葬在迦南地，在我為自己所掘的墳墓裡。”現在求你讓我上去，埋葬我的父親，之後我必定回來。’”

en: And Pharaoh answered, "Go up, and bury your father, as he made you swear."
zh: 法老說：“你可以上去，照著你父親叫你起的誓，把他埋葬。”

en: So Joseph went up to bury his father. With him went up all the servants of Pharaoh, the elders of his household, and all the elders of the land of Egypt,
zh: 於是，約瑟上去埋葬他的父親。與他一同上去的，有法老所有的臣僕，法老家中的長老，和埃及地所有的長老，

en: as well as all the household of Joseph, his brothers, and his father's household. Only their children, their flocks, and their herds were left in the land of Goshen.
zh: 還有約瑟的全家，他的兄弟們和他父親的家人；他們把孩子和牛羊留在歌珊地。

en: And there went up with him both chariots and horsemen. It was a very great company.
zh: 又有車輛和馬兵與他一同上去，成了一大隊行列。

en: When they came to the threshing floor of Atad, which is beyond the Jordan, they lamented there with a very great and grievous lamentation, and he made a mourning for his father seven days.
zh: 他們到了約旦河東岸的亞達禾場，就在那裡大大地哀悼痛哭。約瑟為他父親舉哀七天。

en: When the inhabitants of the land, the Canaanites, saw the mourning on the threshing floor of Atad, they said, "This is a grievous mourning by the Egyptians." Therefore the place was named Abel-mizraim; it is beyond the Jordan.
zh: 住在那地的迦南人看見了亞達禾場的哀悼，就說：“這是埃及人一場非常傷痛的哀悼。”因此，在約旦河東岸的那地方名叫亞伯．麥西。

en: Thus his sons did for him as he had commanded them,
zh: 雅各的眾子就照著父親囑咐他們的去作，

en: for his sons carried him to the land of Canaan and buried him in the cave of the field at Machpelah, to the east of Mamre, which Abraham bought with the field from Ephron the Hittite to possess as a burying place.
zh: 把雅各運到迦南地，葬在麥比拉田間的洞裡。那地方在幔利的前面，是亞伯拉罕向赫人以弗崙買下來作墳地的。

en: After he had buried his father, Joseph returned to Egypt with his brothers and all who had gone up with him to bury his father.
zh: 約瑟埋葬了他父親以後，就和他的眾兄弟，以及所有與他一同上去埋葬他父親的人都回埃及去了。

en: When Joseph's brothers saw that their father was dead, they said, "It may be that Joseph will hate us and pay us back for all the evil that we did to him."
zh: 約瑟的哥哥們看見父親死了，就說：“或者約瑟仍然會懷恨我們，要報復我們從前向他所作的一切惡事。”

en: So they sent a message to Joseph, saying, "Your father gave this command before he died,
zh: 他們就打發人到約瑟那裡，說：“你父親未死以前曾經囑咐說：

en: 'Say to Joseph, Please forgive the transgression of your brothers and their sin, because they did evil to you.' And now, please forgive the transgression of the servants of the God of your father." Joseph wept when they spoke to him.
zh: ‘你們要對約瑟這樣說：從前你的哥哥們惡待你，求你饒恕他們的過犯和罪惡。現在求你饒恕你父親的 神之眾僕人的過犯。’”約瑟聽見這話就哭了。

en: His brothers also came and fell down before him and said, "Behold, we are your servants."
zh: 他的哥哥們也親自來了，俯伏在他面前，說：“看哪，我們是你的奴僕。”

en: But Joseph said to them, "Do not fear, for am I in the place of God?
zh: 約瑟對他們說：“你們不要害怕，我怎能代替 神呢？

en: As for you, you meant evil against me, but God meant it for good, to bring it about that many people should be kept alive, as they are today.
zh: 從前你們有意要害我，但 神有美好的意思在其中，為要成就今日的光景，使許多人的性命得以保全。

en: So do not fear; I will provide for you and your little ones." Thus he comforted them and spoke kindly to them.
zh: 現在你們不要害怕，我必供養你們和你們的孩子。”於是約瑟用仁慈的話安慰他們。

en: So Joseph remained in Egypt, he and his father's house. Joseph lived 110 years.
zh: 約瑟和他父親的家人，都住在埃及。約瑟活了一百一十歲。

en: And Joseph saw Ephraim's children of the third generation. The children also of Machir the son of Manasseh were counted as Joseph's own.
zh: 約瑟見到以法蓮的第三代子孫；瑪拿西的兒子瑪吉的眾子，也歸在約瑟的膝下。

en: And Joseph said to his brothers, "I am about to die, but God will visit you and bring you up out of this land to the land that he swore to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob."
zh: 約瑟對他的兄弟們說：“我快要死了，但 神必定眷顧你們，領你們從這地上到他起誓應許給亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各之地去。”

en: Then Joseph made the sons of Israel swear, saying, "God will surely visit you, and you shall carry up my bones from here."
zh: 約瑟又叫以色列的子孫起誓，說：“ 神必定眷顧你們，那時你們要把我的骸骨從這裡帶上去應許之地。”

en: So Joseph died, being 110 years old. They embalmed him, and he was put in a coffin in Egypt.
zh: 約瑟死了，享壽一百一十歲。人用香料把他包殮了，放在棺材裡，停在埃及。
